record.description_full: Geckoes Lodge provides satta lodge accommodations in Puerto Viejo.

record.business_name: Geckoes Lodge - Playa Cocles, Puerto Viejo, Limón, Costa Rica
record.description_full: Four wonderful holiday villas in a spectacular 2 hectare rainforest garden with river, just minutes from the beach. A treehouse style bungalow for 5, a honeymoon suite, a completely open glamping villa for 3 and an airconditioned casita for 4 await you. Each has a fully equipped kitchen, private garden, bbq and lots of privacy and outside space. One or two bedrooms, some with own private plunge pool. 4.7 / 5 rating on Google Maps  9.8 / 10 rating on Booking.com  5.0 / 5 rating on Tripadvisor  9.9 / 10 rating on VRBO  4.9 / 5 rating on Airbnb

record.business_name: Ecotourism and Conservation Association of Talamanca
record.description_full: Ecotourism and Conservation Association of Talamanca runs tours and activities in the Puerto Viejo area.

Asociación Talamanqueña Ecoturismo Conservación is Puerto Viejo’s original eco-tourism provider. They work to help visitors find fun ecologically and socially responsible activities to entertain themselves while in Talamanca. Also has cards, books, souvenirs and a couple of internet terminals.

record.business_name: Azul Bar and Grill - Playa Negra, Puerto Viejo, Limón, Costa Rica
record.description_full: Restaurant, bar and beach club. Beach service starts at 6am daily. This popular restaurant also serves breakfast, lunch and dinner 7 days a week. Breakfast is included for hotel guests but others are welcome for a fee. They offer free access to high-speed fiber optic internet connection for customers.

record.business_name: Kaya's Place - Playa Negra, Puerto Viejo, Limón, Costa Rica
record.description_full: 26 room lodge on the Black Beach. Built in the Afro-Caribbean "Rustico" style, the hotel is artistic and unique. Variety of rooms from shared bath to suites to cabins. Onsite restaurant, bar and micro-craft brewery. Hotel also called Hotel Playa Negra Brewing. 3.8 / 5 rating on Google Maps  5.8 / 10 rating on Booking.com
